name: hipfire-kernel-tuning
description: Optimize hipfire HIP/compute kernels — pick a tuning lever (multi-row, K-tile depth, prefetch, wave-size port, WMMA/MFMA, fused projections, ISA flags) and validate the win across the supported RDNA arch matrix. Codifies the empirical methodology from this repo's actual perf history: wave64 CDNA3 port (4105035, +2× decode), nontemporal-load fake-win revert (34eb024, −13% caught only by clean-baseline bisect), gfx12 WMMA contributor-port (PR #56), gfx11 WMMA silent-corruption fix (b7ac66a). Use when you have a hot kernel identified by the profiler and need to pick the right lever + validate the win without regressing other archs.
triggers: kernel runs slow at low batch
should I add a multi-row variant

requires.hardware: the target GPU arch (perf claims must be validated on the same arch as the speed-baseline)
